reasoning: The control AU-12 (1) focuses on generating a system-wide and time-correlated audit trail. In Kubernetes, this can be achieved through enabling audit logging, configuring log retention, ensuring audit policies capture necessary metadata, and enabling time correlation in logs. These functions ensure that audit logs are comprehensive and can be correlated across the system for effective monitoring and incident response.
title: Audit Record Generation | System-wide and Time-correlated Audit Trail
